name: Lite 'n Easy Crustless Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: Dark brown sugar (packed or sweetener equivalent)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, sprinkle unflavored gelatin over cold water to soften. Set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, heat 1 cup of evaporated milk to just boiling.
3. Slowly stir the hot milk into the gelatin and stir until the gelatin is dissolved.
4. Mix in the remaining evaporated milk, pumpkin, brown sugar, pumpkin pie spice, and vanilla extract. Set aside.
5. Spray a 10-inch glass pie plate with non-stick vegetable coating.
6. Pour the mixture into the pie plate and chill until firm.
Calories: 97
Fat: 2 g
Sodium: 70 mg
Cholesterol: 4 mg
Source: No Guilt Desserts
